requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety, Nameplate and Construction Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全、铭牌和结构依据
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全、銘牌和結構依據

summary.en: Bangladesh safety review for covered industrial motors should be built around applicable BDS standards, IEC 60034-derived motor construction and rating expectations, BSTI certification evidence, nameplate marking, insulation, temperature rise, enclosure protection and terminal safety.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国对覆盖工业电机的安全审查应围绕适用 BDS 标准、源自 IEC 60034 的电机结构和额定要求、BSTI 认证依据、铭牌标识、绝缘、温升、外壳防护和端子安全建立。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國對覆蓋工業電機的安全審查應圍繞適用 BDS 標準、源自 IEC 60034 的電機結構和額定要求、BSTI 認證依據、銘牌標識、絕緣、溫升、外殼防護和端子安全建立。

standards_or_laws: Applicable BDS motor safety and performance standards
IEC 60034 series as adopted or aligned in BDS
BSTI mandatory certification for covered products

summary.en: China low-voltage motor files commonly include CCC certificates where in scope, GB 18613 efficiency evidence and GB 12665 cooling evidence. Factory routine tests and nameplate drawings may support Bangladesh review but do not replace BSTI certification.
summary.zh: 中国低压电机文件通常包括适用范围内的 CCC 证书、GB 18613 能效依据和 GB 12665 冷却依据。工厂例行测试和铭牌图可支持孟加拉国审查，但不能替代 BSTI 认证。
summary.zht: 中國低壓電機文件通常包括適用範圍內的 CCC 證書、GB 18613 能效依據和 GB 12665 冷卻依據。工廠例行測試和銘牌圖可支持孟加拉國審查，但不能替代 BSTI 認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: The safety gap is local acceptance and model identity. China CCC may show a baseline low-voltage safety process, but Bangladesh needs the exact model, nameplate and BDS/BSTI file for the imported motor.
gap.zh: 安全差距在于当地接受和型号身份。中国 CCC 可显示低压安全流程基础，但孟加拉国需要进口电机的准确型号、铭牌和 BDS/BSTI 文件。
gap.zht: 安全差距在於當地接受和型號身份。中國 CCC 可顯示低壓安全流程基礎，但孟加拉國需要進口電機的準確型號、銘牌和 BDS/BSTI 文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where BSTI covered-product certification or BDS safety review applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where CCC and China GB standards apply in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build the Bangladesh safety file around the exact imported model and BDS or IEC 60034 basis. China CCC is supporting evidence, not Bangladesh approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国安全文件应围绕准确进口型号及 BDS 或 IEC 60034 基础建立。中国 CCC 是支持依据，不是孟加拉国批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉國安全文件應圍繞準確進口型號及 BDS 或 IEC 60034 基礎建立。中國 CCC 是支持依據，不是孟加拉國批准。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage Fit and Installation Safety
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压适配与安装安全
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓適配與安裝安全

summary.en: Bangladesh industrial installations commonly use 400/230 V, 50 Hz three-phase supply. Installation safety should confirm motor voltage range, thermal margin, starting current, protection coordination, earthing, overload protection and compatibility with the connected load and local grid conditions.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国工业安装通常使用 400/230 V、50 Hz 三相供电。安装安全应确认电机电压范围、热裕量、启动电流、保护配合、接地、过载保护，以及与连接负载和当地电网条件的兼容性。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國工業安裝通常使用 400/230 V、50 Hz 三相供電。安裝安全應確認電機電壓範圍、熱裕量、啟動電流、保護配合、接地、過載保護，以及與連接負載和當地電網條件的兼容性。

standards_or_laws: BERC grid and energy regulatory context
Bangladesh 400/230 V, 50 Hz three-phase supply practice
Applicable BDS or IEC installation and motor safety concepts

summary.en: China industrial motors are often rated for 380 V, 50 Hz and supported by GB 18613, GB 12665 and CCC where applicable. The shared 50 Hz frequency helps, but the 380 V to 400 V nominal voltage difference should be addressed in the nameplate, manual and thermal testing evidence.
summary.zh: 中国工业电机通常按 380 V、50 Hz 额定，并由 GB 18613、GB 12665 及适用时的 CCC 支持。50 Hz 相同有利于适配，但 380 V 与 400 V 标称电压差异应在铭牌、说明书和热测试依据中处理。
summary.zht: 中國工業電機通常按 380 V、50 Hz 額定，並由 GB 18613、GB 12665 及適用時的 CCC 支持。50 Hz 相同有利於適配，但 380 V 與 400 V 標稱電壓差異應在銘牌、說明書和熱測試依據中處理。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: The practical safety gap is voltage tolerance and installation documentation. A 380 V China motor may be acceptable only if its declared range and thermal design support Bangladesh 400 V operation under real load conditions.
gap.zh: 实际安全差距在于电压公差和安装文件。中国 380 V 电机只有在声明范围和热设计支持孟加拉国 400 V 实际负载运行时才可能适用。
gap.zht: 實際安全差距在於電壓公差和安裝文件。中國 380 V 電機只有在聲明範圍和熱設計支持孟加拉國 400 V 實際負載運行時才可能適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory practical requirement for safe installation and grid connection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where China rating and CCC or GB requirements apply to the supplied motor

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Frequency is aligned at 50 Hz, but voltage fit still needs evidence. Confirm 400 V operation before treating a China 380 V motor as ready for Bangladesh.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 频率同为 50 Hz，但仍需证明电压适配。在将中国 380 V 电机视为可用于孟加拉国前，应确认 400 V 运行依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 頻率同為 50 Hz，但仍需證明電壓適配。在將中國 380 V 電機視為可用於孟加拉國前，應確認 400 V 運行依據。
